prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: SEO source image for a before-and-after photo maker template
Primary request: Create a synthetic dental veneers before-and-after comparison source image.
Subject: Adult smile close-up cropped from nose to chin, two comparison panels stacked vertically. Top panel shows natural slightly uneven teeth; bottom panel shows cleaner aligned veneer-like smile.
Style/medium: Photorealistic synthetic stock-style mockup, not a real patient record.
Composition/framing: Clinical dental photography, centered mouth close-up, consistent angle and lighting across both panels, no frame, no labels, no text.
Lighting/mood: Bright dental clinic lighting, clean and trustworthy.
Constraints: Adult only; no logos; no watermark; no typography; no dental tools; no blood; no identifiable full face; no celebrity likeness; no extreme transformation.
Avoid: extra teeth, distorted mouth, text artifacts, before/after labels.

Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: SEO source image for a teeth whitening before-and-after template
Primary request: Create a synthetic teeth whitening before-and-after comparison source image.
Subject: Adult smile close-up, two side-by-side panels with the same generic mouth angle. Left panel has naturally stained teeth; right panel has visibly brighter but realistic teeth.
Style/medium: Photorealistic synthetic dental stock photo, not a real patient record.
Composition/framing: Tight mouth crop, consistent lighting and crop, no frame, no labels, no text.
Lighting/mood: Bright neutral dental lighting, polished but believable.
Constraints: Adult only; no logos; no watermark; no typography; no dental tools; no blood; no identifiable full face; no celebrity likeness; no exaggerated neon-white teeth.
Avoid: distorted anatomy, extra teeth, text artifacts, labels.

Subject: Adult mouth close-up in two side-by-side panels. Left panel shows teeth with braces and mild crowding; right panel shows aligned teeth after orthodontic treatment, no braces.
Style/medium: Photorealistic synthetic dental stock photo, not a real patient record.
Composition/framing: Consistent crop from nose to chin, centered mouth, no UI frame, no labels, no text.

Avoid: impossible braces placement, extra teeth, distorted mouth, text artifacts.

Use case: photorealistic-natural

Subject: Adult cheek and lower-face close-up, two side-by-side panels. Left panel shows mild acne redness and texture; right panel shows calmer skin with less redness. Keep the same generic face angle.
Style/medium: Photorealistic synthetic skincare stock photo, not a real medical record.
Composition/framing: Non-identifiable crop, cheek and jawline only, no full face, no UI frame, no labels, no text.
Lighting/mood: Soft clinic/skincare lighting, respectful and neutral.
Constraints: Adult only; no logos; no watermark; no typography; no blood; no wounds; no severe disease; no celebrity likeness; no unrealistic perfect skin.
Avoid: graphic lesions, text artifacts, exaggerated transformation, beauty retouching that looks fake.
